raw_transcript: Vomiting undigested food hours later is highly suggestive of Gastroparesis—literally, 'paralyzed stomach.' Given your long history of diabetes, the high blood sugar has likely damaged the vagus nerve that controls your stomach muscles.
final_corrected_note: Vomiting undigested food hours later is highly suggestive of Gastroparesis—literally, 'paralyzed stomach.' Given your long history of diabetes, the high blood sugar has likely damaged the vagus nerve that controls your stomach muscles.
